title: pelargonium × queenii
intro: Pelargonium × queenii, also known as Queen's Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the geranium family (Geraniaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits associated with Queen's Rose Geranium include relief from anxiety, stress, and menstrual cramps, as well as its potential to help regulate blood sugar levels and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × queenii can be found in the form of essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
